title: Vue 3 async components cause a massive amount of msearch requests
body:
### 🐛 Current behavior When using Vue 3 with Instantsearch components being loaded in using [Vues Async components](https://vuejs.org/guide/components/async) feature. The amount of `_msearch` requests done explode: **all** of these requests are the same query that is executed Additional information: Every ais component i remove from within the `ais-instant-search` component reduces the amount of requests sent ### 🔍 Steps to reproduce 1. Set up a Vue 3 project with Instantsearch installed 2. Load instantsearch using lazy components: ```js const app = createApp({ /* root component options */ }) app.component('ais-instant-search', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/InstantSearch'))) app.component('ais-hits', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/Hits.js'))) app.component('ais-infinite-hits', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/InfiniteHits.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-configure', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/Configure.js'))) app.component('ais-autocomplete', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/Autocomplete.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-search-box', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/SearchBox.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-state-results', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/StateResults.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-index', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/Index.js'))) app.component('ais-refinement-list', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/RefinementList.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-hierarchical-menu', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/HierarchicalMenu.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-range-input', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/RangeInput.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-current-refinements', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/CurrentRefinements.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-clear-refinements', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/ClearRefinements.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-hits-per-page', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/HitsPerPage.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-sort-by', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/SortBy.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-pagination', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/Pagination.vue.js'))) app.component('ais-stats', defineAsyncComponent(() => import('vue-instantsearch/vue3/es/src/components/Stats.vue.js'))) ... app.mount('#app') ``` 3. Load your components in HTML ```html
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
``` 4. Observe how many exactly the same _msearch requests are being run ### Live reproduction I am unauthorized to make changes to the sandbox ### 💭 Expected behavior Since the queries being run are the same i would expect Instantsearch to simply let one of the queries run. Possibly by deferring or returning the same request promise that is already running. ### Package version vue-instantsearch 4.23.1, vue 3.5.25 ### Operating system macOS 26.1 ### Browser Chrome 144.0.7559.112 ### Code of Conduct - [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
